Research workshop in Krems (11/12.June 2026): Together with Maud Bachelet and Dr. Federica Zardo, I'm organising a second research workshop of my Ambizione project on responsibility-sharing in European migration governance, taking place at the Danube University in Krems (AT). We bring together various scholars and practitioners to discuss responsibility-sharing at the nexus between domestic politics and international cooperation. The keynote lecture will be held by Prof. Dr. Daniel Thym (University of Konstanz). Online participation possible upon request.
